name: l2_static_airframe_multi_axis_run_matrix
value: Aerodynamics4McL2StaticAirframeMultiAxisRunMatrix runs compact reflected L2 force moment summaries for each static-airframe sweep target.
note: Reference surface for live multi-axis A4MC L2 static-airframe run summaries.

name: l2_static_airframe_multi_axis_sweep_plan
value: Aerodynamics4McL2StaticAirframeMultiAxisSweepPlan supplies the 24 forward reverse sideslip and angle-of-attack request targets.
note: Reference surface for live multi-axis A4MC L2 static-airframe run summaries.

name: l2_bridge_force_moment
value: Aerodynamics4McL2Bridge builds A4MC L2 requests and extracts compact force moment and pressure-center results without retaining raw flow atlas state.
note: Reference surface for live multi-axis A4MC L2 static-airframe run summaries.

name: drone_physics_airframe
value: DronePhysics consumes fitted airframe drag lift sideforce moment and pressure-center behavior after later acceptance gates open.
note: Reference surface for live multi-axis A4MC L2 static-airframe run summaries.

name: aerodynamics4mc_l2_target
value: Aerodynamics4MC Core is the upstream target for live multi-axis L2 force moment and pressure-center runs.
note: Reference surface for live multi-axis A4MC L2 static-airframe run summaries.
